_comment: Single source of truth for the sponsor wall on the website (and a mirror in README). Sorted by tier (gold > silver > bronze > supporter), then by `weight` descending WITHIN a tier. `weight` is a private sort key (never displayed) — you may set it to the monthly amount or any relative number; the public site never shows the figure. Tier is derived purely from this list, not from `weight`, so you stay in control. `logo` is optional: a sponsor with no logo renders as a name chip with their link. To add a sponsor: drop one object in `sponsors[]` and (when logos are used) put the image under web/img/sponsors/. Later this file can be auto-generated from the GitHub Sponsors API by a scheduled GitHub Action — the schema stays the same.
